age_range.evidence: To be included in the study, prospective participants had to live in the United States, own and use an Android phone, be between the ages of 14 and 18...

countries.evidence: To be included in the study, prospective participants had to live in the United States...

fieldwork_year.evidence: We conducted virtual co-design sessions with nineteen teens in summer 2021 following the initial design and development of the prototype

gender_split.evidence: The first group included fourteen teens aged 14-16 years (Mage=15.0 years; 2 male, 1 female, 1 non-binary; 2 Asian, 2 white). The second group included five teens aged 15-18 years (Mage=16.2 years; 3 male, 2 female; 3 Asian, 2 white).

sample_size.evidence: Sixty-six participants met the inclusion criteria and successfully installed the Locus app on their phone. Of those participants, 54 completed all study procedures...
